---
title: "The Severity of War"
subtitle: "A Longitudinal Analysis"
categories: ["Power Law"]
date: "2026-01-21"
image: "../images/problemset_screenshot.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---
<iframe src="../sample_problem_set.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;">
  This browser does not support PDFs. Please download the PDF to view it.
</iframe>
